description: An MCP server for Azure DevOps

findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74 in minimatch@10.0.1
findings.recommendation: Upgrade minimatch to a version that resolves GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-23c5-xmqv-rm74 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
